default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Canary Marketing's swag offerings and discuss potential collaboration for GrowthX's merchandise needs.](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Canary Marketing offers full-service swag solutions, including design, production, storage, and global distribution](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [GrowthX needs employee kits for new hires and customers, with a focus on fashionable, high-quality items](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Initial quote for 50 kits (\~$80/kit) includes various items, storage, and distribution services](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Next steps: Arrange showroom visit for GrowthX's CEO to explore options and make decisions](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Needs

  - [GrowthX: New, remote-first company with global presence (20+ countries)](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Primarily US customers, some international](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [CEO (Marcel) highly involved in branding decisions, fashion-conscious](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Need employee kits for new hires and customer gifts](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [No current inventory storage capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### Canary Marketing's Offerings

  - [Full-service merchandise solutions for various company sizes](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Focus on useful, impactful items aligned with brand ethos](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Design capabilities: 3D embroidery, custom imprints, elevated aesthetics](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Fulfillment services: Storage, kitting, global shipping](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Customizable ordering process: Monthly or bi-weekly shipments](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Pricing and Logistics

  - [Initial quote: 50 kits at \~$80/kit (includes items, packaging, fulfillment)](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Monthly fees: Storage ($150), Program hosting ($250)](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Drop shipping charges vary by location](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Set-up charges for initial designs (waived on reorders)](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Potential for lower per-unit costs with larger orders](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Lead time: 3-4 weeks for kit production and fulfillment](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)

### Product Options and Customization

  - [Samples available for touch and feel](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Showroom in San Francisco office for in-person viewing](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Ability to source specific items based on client preferences](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Design team can create custom artwork based on brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)

### International Shipping Considerations

  - [Logistics team handles country-specific regulations](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [May use freight forwarders or suggest alternative delivery methods for challenging locations](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to contact CEO about visiting Canary Marketing's SF showroom](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Canary to send showroom availability for the next couple of weeks](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [If showroom visit not possible, Canary to send product samples to GrowthX's WeWork in SF](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Bridget to email Canary with decision on next steps](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Consider increasing initial order quantity for potential cost savings](https://fathom.video/share/aKvysduyzqp66zm_6-HnqrcD3RC3zAgb?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

action_items.description: Send additional hoodie & shirt options to Bridget
Call Marcel re visiting Canary Marketing SF showroom to select swag items
Email Canary team re Marcel's availability for SF showroom visit
Send showroom availability schedule for next couple weeks to Bridget
Recalculate costs for larger order quantity (e.g. 100 kits vs 50)
